title: Malviya Nagar hotel fire: Delhi court denies bail to cook Kesar Negi
description: A Delhi court on Monday denied bail to Kesar Negi, the cook who was arrested by Delhi Police in the recent Malviya Nagar hotel fire case. Judicial Magistrate First Class (JMFC) Bhanu Pratap Singh of the Saket Courts passed the order and sent Negi to judicial custody for two weeks. The Court also extended by two days the police custody of Lavkesh Bajaj, the owner of the establishment. A total of 22 people, including 13 foreigners, were killed in Malviya Nagar’s Hauz Rani area last week in a fire
